title: Yahoo Stock Price Prediction Pipeline
text: This end-to-end framework implements structured time-series data cleaning, feature engineering, and a machine learning tournament to predict daily log returns.

When you click the Render button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:
